languages.text: "...перед взором Его клянусь быть верным присяге и обету, сохранять отвагу перед лицом любого врага Человечества и, не дрогнув, принять смерть..."
languages.translation_comment: Сначала барк говорит мейнчарактер (Олежкин или Дунаевская), потом его повторяют все собравшиеся гвардейцы

languages.text: "...before His gaze I swear to be true to my oath and vow, to hold fast to my courage in the face of all enemies of Humanity, and to unflinchingly meet my death..."
languages.original_text: "...перед взором Его клянусь быть верным присяге и обету, сохранять отвагу перед лицом любого врага Человечества и, не дрогнув, принять смерть..."

traits.locale_text: "...before His gaze I swear to be true to my oath and vow, to hold fast to my courage in the face of all enemies of Humanity, and to unflinchingly meet my death..."
"...before His gaze I swear to be true to my oath and vow, to hold fast to my courage in the face of all enemies of Humanity, and to unflinchingly meet my death..."
"...before His gaze I swear to be true to my oath and vow, to hold fast to my courage in the face of all enemies of Humanity, and to unflinchingly meet my death..."

languages.text: "...彼の視線のもと、私は誓う。私の誓い、私の決意を貫き、人類の敵に立ち向かう勇気を失わず、そして死を恐れずに迎える..."
languages.original_text: "...before His gaze I swear to be true to my oath and vow, to hold fast to my courage in the face of all enemies of Humanity, and to unflinchingly meet my death..."

traits.locale_text: "...彼の視線のもと、私は誓う。私の誓い、私の決意を貫き、人類の敵に立ち向かう勇気を失わず、そして死を恐れずに迎える..."

languages.text: “……在祂的注视之下，我宣誓忠于我的誓言，面对人类的一切敌人，我将坚守勇气，毫不畏惧地迎接死亡……”
languages.original_text: "...before His gaze I swear to be true to my oath and vow, to hold fast to my courage in the face of all enemies of Humanity, and to unflinchingly meet my death..."

traits.locale_text: “……在祂的注视之下，我宣誓忠于我的誓言，面对人类的一切敌人，我将坚守勇气，毫不畏惧地迎接死亡……”

languages.text: "... schwöre ich vor seinem Antlitz, dass ich meinem Eid und Schwur Folge leisten, mich allen Feinden der Menschheit stellen und dem Tod mutig ins Auge blicken werde."
languages.original_text: "...before His gaze I swear to be true to my oath and vow, to hold fast to my courage in the face of all enemies of Humanity, and to unflinchingly meet my death..."

traits.locale_text: "... schwöre ich vor seinem Antlitz, dass ich meinem Eid und Schwur Folge leisten, mich allen Feinden der Menschheit stellen und dem Tod mutig ins Auge blicken werde."

languages.text: « ... sous Son regard, je jure de respecter mon serment et mon vœu, de rester brave face aux ennemis de l'humanité, et d'accepter la mort sans faillir... »
languages.original_text: "...before His gaze I swear to be true to my oath and vow, to hold fast to my courage in the face of all enemies of Humanity, and to unflinchingly meet my death..."

traits.locale_text: « ... sous Son regard, je jure de respecter mon serment et mon vœu, de rester brave face aux ennemis de l'humanité, et d'accepter la mort sans faillir... »

languages.text: «... ante Su mirada, juro cumplir mis votos y compromisos, mantenerme firme ante los enemigos de la Humanidad y enfrentar la muerte sin rechistar...».
languages.original_text: "...before His gaze I swear to be true to my oath and vow, to hold fast to my courage in the face of all enemies of Humanity, and to unflinchingly meet my death..."

traits.locale_text: «... ante Su mirada, juro cumplir mis votos y compromisos, mantenerme firme ante los enemigos de la Humanidad y enfrentar la muerte sin rechistar...».

languages.text: "O'nun bakışları önünde yeminime ve andıma sadık kalacağıma, İnsanlığın tüm düşmanları karşısında cesaretime sımsıkı tutunacağıma ve ölümümü gözümü kırpmadan karşılayacağıma yemin ederim..."
languages.original_text: "...before His gaze I swear to be true to my oath and vow, to hold fast to my courage in the face of all enemies of Humanity, and to unflinchingly meet my death..."

traits.locale_text: "O'nun bakışları önünde yeminime ve andıma sadık kalacağıma, İnsanlığın tüm düşmanları karşısında cesaretime sımsıkı tutunacağıma ve ölümümü gözümü kırpmadan karşılayacağıma yemin ederim..."
